title: Single-select questions
description: radiogroup and dropdown — the two closed-ended types wired end-to-end today. One scalar answer per question, resolved to an option_key in dim_option.

elements.name: employment_status
elements.title: What is your current employment status?

elements.name: region
elements.title: Which region do you live in?
elements.description: Object choices carry a stable machine `value` plus a human `text`. dim_option keys on `value`, so the text can be reworded without changing the warehouse key.
